detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CORWS._transfer(address,address,uint256) (CORWS.sol#661-785):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (CORWS.sol#725)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (CORWS.sol#799-811)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (CORWS.sol#731)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (CORWS.sol#819)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CORWS.sol#783)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (CORWS.sol#945)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (CORWS.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (CORWS.sol#927)
	CORWS._rOwned (CORWS.sol#339) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CORWS._takeTeam(uint256) (CORWS.sol#939-947)
	- CORWS._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (CORWS.sol#899-935)
	- CORWS.balanceOf(address) (CORWS.sol#487-491)
	- CORWS.constructor() (CORWS.sol#421-451)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (CORWS.sol#783)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (CORWS.sol#953)
	CORWS._rTotal (CORWS.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- CORWS._getCurrentSupply() (CORWS.sol#1095-1105)
	- CORWS._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (CORWS.sol#951-957)
	- CORWS.constructor() (CORWS.sol#421-451)
	- CORWS.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (CORWS.sol#583-605)
